Struct FlyOutPanelOptions

Represents a set of configuration options used to initialize an IFlyOutPanel.

Inherited Members
ValueType.Equals(object)
ValueType.GetHashCode()
ValueType.ToString()
object.Equals(object, object)
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.GetType()
Namespace: PhiRobotics.UI.FlyOutPanels
Assembly: PhiRobotics.UI.dll
Syntax
public struct FlyOutPanelOptions
Remarks

This structure provides a convenient way to configure positioning, resizing behavior, and lifecycle management of the fly-out panel content.

Constructors

FlyOutPanelOptions(AnchorStyles, ResizeMode, bool, bool, bool)

Initializes a new instance of the FlyOutPanelOptions struct with the specified anchor style, resize mode, and other optional parameters.

Declaration
public FlyOutPanelOptions(AnchorStyles anchorStyle, ResizeMode resizeMode = ResizeMode.None, bool disposeContent = true, bool disposeContentOnChange = true, bool enableIndent = true)
Parameters
Type Name Description
AnchorStyles anchorStyle

Specifies how the panel is positioned relative to its host.
ResizeMode resizeMode

Specifies how the panel can be resized.
bool disposeContent

Indicates whether the panel content is disposed when the panel is closed.
bool disposeContentOnChange

Indicates whether the panel content is disposed when replaced.
bool enableIndent

Indicates whether the panel can be repositioned using indentation.

Fields

DefaultAnchorStyle

The default value for AnchorStyle property.

Declaration
public const AnchorStyles DefaultAnchorStyle = TopRight

Type Description
AnchorStyles

DefaultDisposeContent

The default value for DisposeContent property.

Declaration
public const bool DefaultDisposeContent = true

bool

Declaration
public const bool DefaultDisposeContentOnChange = true

Type Description
bool

DefaultEnableIndent

The default value for EnableIndent property.

Declaration
public const bool DefaultEnableIndent = true
Field Value
Type Description
bool

DefaultResizeMode

The default value for ResizeMode property.

Declaration
public const ResizeMode DefaultResizeMode = None
Field Value
Type Description
ResizeMode

Properties

AnchorStyle

Gets or sets how the panel is positioned relative to its host.

Declaration
public AnchorStyles AnchorStyle { get; set; }

Type Description
AnchorStyles

DisposeContent

Gets or sets a value indicating whether the panel content is disposed when the panel is closed.

Declaration
public bool DisposeContent { get; set; }

Type Description
bool

DisposeContentOnChange

Gets or sets a value indicating whether the panel content is disposed when replaced.

Declaration
public bool DisposeContentOnChange { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
bool

EnableIndent

Gets or sets a value indicating whether the panel supports indentation.

Declaration
public bool EnableIndent { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
bool
Remarks

Panel can be indented by IndentPanel(int, int) method.

ResizeMode

Gets or sets how the panel can be resized.

Declaration
public ResizeMode ResizeMode { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
ResizeMode
Remarks

Panel can be resized by ResizePanel(int, int) method.
